_comment: TAB entity-type -> detailed attribute description fed to the defender/attacker/judge. Wording follows the TAB annotation guidelines (https://github.com/NorskRegnesentral/text-anonymization-benchmark/blob/master/guidelines.md). The eval data keeps the short type as `label`; eval.py expands it via this map at run time.
PERSON: names of people — full names, surnames, initials, nicknames, aliases and usernames
CODE: numbers and codes that identify someone or something — case/application numbers, social-security, phone, passport or licence numbers, report IDs
LOC: places and locations — cities, regions, countries, street addresses, and named infrastructures such as bridges or bus stops
ORG: names of organisations — companies, courts, prisons, schools, universities, hospitals, NGOs, churches, and their acronyms
DEM: demographic attributes — nationality, ethnicity, descent, native language, job title or rank, education, physical description, medical diagnosis, and age
DATETIME: specific dates, times and durations — a date, a year, a time of day, or a span of time
QUANTITY: meaningful quantities — monetary amounts, percentages, and measurements with their units
MISC: any other identifying detail about a person — trademarks, products, events, speeches, laws, and named ideas or movements
